name: Glyph
description: Local multimedia system with Funscript heatmap support

scripts.clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "@('dist','tmp_asar_client','tmp_asar_server','glyph-tv-android\\build','glyph-tv-android\\app\\build','glyph-tv-android\\.gradle','glyph-tv-android\\build-kotlin.log') | ForEach-Object { if (Test-Path $_) { Remove-Item $_ -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }"
scripts.clean:artifacts: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "@('dist-client','dist-server') | ForEach-Object { if (Test-Path $_) { Remove-Item $_ -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }"
scripts.pack:all:win: npm run pack:client:win && npm run pack:server:win
scripts.pack:all:mac: npm run pack:client:mac && npm run pack:server:mac

author: Looney
